---
title: "Labs"
toc: false
---

Step-by-step walkthroughs you can run on your own machine. Labs are
designed to be **self-serve**: read top to bottom, follow along,
verify each step, then submit the relevant homework.

The course's 2-hour weekly block is optional supported lab time in
the MAC — you can work on these on your own or come in for help.

## Available

- [Lab 1 — Install the stack (R, RStudio, TinyTeX, Quarto)](lab01-install-stack.qmd)

## Planned

Labs are added as the course is built. The rough plan:

- Lab 2 — Your first Quarto document with R and math
- Lab 3 — A tour of a tidy dataset in R
- Lab 4 — Writing math in LaTeX
- Lab 5 — Theorem environments and a bibliography
- Lab 6 — A small simulation in R
- Lab 7 — Drafting math prose with an AI assistant (with verification)
- Lab 8 — A first portfolio folder

Lab numbering is rough — not every week has a paired lab.
